title: Wayland marble
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Wayland marble''' was presumably a type of stone from [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]]. The [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] had tiled floors of Wayland marble. It was presumed to be extremely expensive, with each tile running at about five thousand credits. It had a translucent white appearance, with strands of gold in its surface.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]''
